description: Relations source -> target between Labster DS components. Used to answer Report queries like 'where is X used?' or 'what does Y contain?'.

relations.context: Card variant=with-actions contains 1-2 Button instances in the action area (typically secondary + primary, or a single link). Labster.io service cards use 1 Button variant=link ('En savoir plus →').
Card MAY contain Input instances (form cards), but this is rare in MVP. Form-heavy cards should consider Dialog (modal form) or a dedicated form page.
Form variant of Dialog uses Input children (size-small + labelPlacement=inline-left in the Shadcn master 4:329)

Button section of Dialog. Variant depends on Dialog variant: informational uses 1 secondary; confirmation uses secondary+primary; destructive-confirmation uses secondary+danger; form uses secondary+primary.

Input can optionally include a suffix Button (e.g. 'Subscribe' inline button observed in Shadcn variants 6:268 / 6:276). Not promoted as a standalone Labster pattern in V0.1 but documented for completeness.

expected_screens.name: labster.io homepage (Patterns page in Figma DS V0.1)
expected_screens.pattern: 3-4 service cards in a horizontal row, each with subtitle 'Service' + title + body + 'En savoir plus →' link

expected_screens.name: contact form (Patterns page)
optional_uses: Card (variant=elevated for the form panel wrapper)

missing_relations_noted.resolution: Card created from scratch for Labster (2026-05-22). See components/Card.design.md. Card now exists alongside Dialog (Dialog reserved for true modal use cases).
